title: No Netherite Datapack
description: A small datapack that removes craftable netherite tools and weapons
body:
## **No Netherite!**
This Datapack **Rewrites The Vanilla Recipes** To Stop The Crafting Of Netherite Tools And Armor.

![noneth](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd9742a82b8567a791a47a365d0e461a9f1cf3db.jpeg)

To remove certain restrictions on crafting (Such as allowing netherite pickaxes), go to 
**_data\minecraft\recipe_** in the datapack and delete the file of your choice.
